degraded_reason: Single ready bead implemented directly by parent; independent Codex reviewer subagents used for review gate.
review_blocker_summary: Initial public API review requested defensive cloning for public mutable attribute containers and explicit errors.As coverage.
Initial internal contract review requested an explicit public/internal exporter adapter boundary, snapshot-safe internal errors, and operation-count visibility.
Updated public Observation cloning for Metadata, map[string]string, Summary.Fields, and nested mutable containers; added errors.As coverage through errors.Join.
Updated internal exporter interfaces with PublicAdapter, snapshot-safe ObservationError fields, and Snapshot.OperationCounts.
Focused re-reviews approved both blocker sets with no remaining blocking findings.
